items.message: No documentation update needed. PR #58379 by `@ArthurMa1978` is a batch release preparation commit for 10 Azure.ResourceManager SDKs (Automanage, Automation, Billing, BillingBenefits, Blueprint, BotService, CarbonOptimization, ChangeAnalysis, Chaos, CloudHealth). Changes are limited to CHANGELOG date stamps, removal of empty sections, and dependency version bumps (Azure.Core 1.53.0, Azure.ResourceManager 1.14.0). No new APIs or types were introduced, and all affected packages already have READMEs in place.
